name: Democratic Membership Alert
subject: What your DNC Membership really does:
body:
---
Derek, If you’ve ever gotten a fundraising email from a campaign or organization like the DNC and asked yourself “ _What would my $7 donation to the DNC actually do?_ ” we’d understand. During such a consequential election year, it’s important that our supporters are informed about what the DNC is doing to support Democratic candidates and state parties in the fight to win back the House and the Senate, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **So, Derek, here’s what the DNC does with your $7 to elect Democrats all across the country:**
* We’re working in key battleground states to register hundreds of thousands of new Democratic voters.
* We launched our DNC Playbook — a resource complete with case studies, research, and community insights that will equip campaigns and state parties across the country with the information and skills they need to implement winning organizing strategies.
* We’re suing the Trump administration to defend the American people from Republican attacks on vote-by-mail.

[**We know it might not seem like $7 can do that much, but when we combine your $7 with donations from thousands of other Democrats across the country, it adds up quickly. Can you pitch in today and help support our work across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**
---
****
**When you pitch in $7 today, you’ll also reserve your Official 2026 DNC Member Card →**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)
These member cards are meant to serve as a reminder that we’re all part of a mission to elect Democrats up and down the ballot — _this year and beyond_ — who will stop Trump’s agenda and serve the American people. **You’re an invaluable member of our team, so we hope you’ll officially join us by reserving your member card today.**
**[CLAIM YOURS NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**
Every member card donation will go directly towards electing Democrats up and down the ballot, in every corner of the country.
[**Derek, we’re grateful to have you on our team, and we hope you’ll consider donating $7 to the DNC today to help us continue building power and elect Democrats all across the country this year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**
---
****
| **[Donate $32](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?express_lane=true&amount=32&refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**

name: [MISSING YOUR RESPONSE] (VPP)
subject: Do you stand with Trump?
body:
If you said NO, read this >>>
| Why have you NOT COMPLETED your Donald Trump approval poll?!

**As we speak, Trump’s approval rating is SURGING.** And if you and 28 supporters fail to respond, Trump’s chances of staying in office WILL CLIMB **DRASTICALLY.** 📈

This is your FINAL chance to answer our poll before it closes by midnight.

—The Voter Protection Project

**_*5,000 RESPONSES FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT *_**
**FIRST:** Trump went after public broadcasting, Social Security, and **now our elections.**

**THEN:** Democrats **HUMILIATED** him at his State of the Union address and the most recent No Kings Protests.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23855%2E878179%2Ep-UpVP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23855%2E878179%2Ep-UpVP).**

subject: A recent poll came out, then Trump attacked me.

body:
President Trump took to Truth Social to endorse my opponent and attack me – just minutes after a brand-new poll came out showing this race statistically tied.
#
Peter, this changes everything.
**Last month, President Trump took to Truth Social to endorse my opponent and attack me – just minutes after a brand-new poll came out showing this race statistically tied.**
Here’s why that matters so much: When Trump tells right-wing Republicans to jump, they jump. And right now, he’s telling them that there’s nothing more important for the GOP’s control of the Senate than winning in North Carolina.
**With this new poll out, even more right-wing money is about to flood our state. I can’t fight back without your help.**

In Trump’s first year, he’s done EVERYTHING he can to crush our Democracy and rebuild our country in his image.

name: Burt Jones
subject: It’s almost time to vote, Georgia!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA INC
body:
|
---
Friend,

Burt Jones here.

President Donald J. Trump has given me his Complete and Total Endorsement for Governor of Georgia – and now I’m asking you personally to back us up by getting out there to vote!

Early voting runs from April 27 – May 15, and this is when our America First grassroots movement can build an unbeatable lead before Election Day on May 19.

[](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=qjJmGenH-pyLv369BUDq4fxx4Qab1VDYXF-mHUi4Pn498mdOKgomHykEIYe8vTw1o8M2YQs7OACcJLBRX1wZz1wbOw8v2DnD90ph-rcX0bEpj2DDNS6Bvge_MX7LEPs_4LI-RGjiVU2e9Dn0u676RSc5CjXU99b4VR7kgysmtjSORewe497GffcV7VFZ6kmapOstlTO5gVdiKeh9NN5_e-VNtiTWPcJltaP7g7wMGlIF3Y4BkAUNAyRQwT4NEuUuGDfOTNqkXL_lDdrtvU4nzrb-4aoAcJH4iLTiHXL2vVrqRTrX-XYuGNH84oaoEkiP)

President Trump has said I’ve been “tested at the most difficult levels and times,” that I’m a “WARRIOR,” and that I will “never let Georgia down.” I was proud to stand with him when it wasn’t easy—and I’m honored he’s standing with me now as we fight to keep red.

But his endorsement is just the beginning. To win this race and deliver on our America First agenda—lower taxes, safer communities, secure elections, and strong Georgia values—I need you to get out and vote.

Here’s how you can help me right now:

* Make your plan to vote early between April 27 – May 15 or on Election Day on May 19th.
* Forward this email to 3 friends who support President Trump.
* Bring a family member, neighbor, or church friend with you when you go to vote.
* Help us fill up the gas tanks, put yard signs all over Georgia, and spread our message on TV by [**DONATING HERE**](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=qjJmGenH-pyLv369BUDq4fKchRMoOIT2GA85KsWO1rbUnvmSKMKfHldR4ws91ARRzcAmqOyaILuGOPA6DEpttq_krk0LNCzLTbywxumRQ2mfhjuoGfuRpKZqxVxQ1-1Iu7MB0UCaMIKbnP99QG9q_vtpOC23jznEOuhqUi_OVLlkyqe4N1-y7fSQKXBaEQty9ecfndZyZINdVFkv6EGNERfoZY8yEGoohe95hzWb6ugovvTteiOu_i-6HyFRElN9xrfOMME_7K35G3hqx1yzyS9vNswLdosk9t49ku9NC-GiHHHQXb1eLbq61Un3gqv3IFiENgAANOliBChNSk1dMNiN0SWE3eiC4KZ1Qf0HBHRIDp7ctsjfiD5Oin1dGslQyk8wsBCRwIY58JpTgqL7P5mWpR3k4jTv6S6tV6O0FIk%3D)

Every early vote we bank sends a message: Georgia conservatives are organized, motivated, and ready to finish the job. When Trump Country turns out early, we win.

Please take a moment today to lock in your plan to vote for me:

[ **👉 Find your early voting location and times HERE** ](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=qjJmGenH-pyLv369BUDq4dkjsvrrRbDS-Ggr-wO-RLSo60gxEQknl3ctPgRhhz4EVlt5tmoCIlyFUlyVLTSibAj0ernQX4JEWxz9itzIs6vTI5YpHPTI5rwHTfAcyyA4Gi_-_CtBjUJT_yALGK2djMkBONYOheOpi61ZJFWhj3yezuO5womlsJfGkQPN9Vz-shzTXsUzplJ0HBktM_Sknjxo2wEBqfB7Dig8De92NxjDPCePcHigaN6vzrIFFMfS4XNo8ym3oMlU1VcYZC9BsGF649ns1d6my4DchdrH0Cz7Bm-Y1X6KX4_L6VpW7idKA4rzHo7VnYN5XmdMfI43rw%3D%3D)

[ **👉 GO TO BurtJonesForGA.com TO LEARN MORE** ](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=57NUi8GFgP7HO3YttjWDrNFb7DZdMaCPjiaWtt18ElSPSL6AVbK144SuykmEU7xEpyae7-hl_KxYgRwI-o1O_IJn98EiMKon6QEJ3AFO_9pMcIdARrb5UdBl59oebMpm13JR6ZB5-ON0XkwS2Pul2bLDkJiD0eEabxfbzPNF_iu15XIGyx84eSdHBIPJUJj9PGXr3VWGPH0oUWviVM9sgPfIAMEupFmzQUxHqWcibEfywRb1hW9VYKzj8RACzqLd2cjgNlPoQWLTGHUcVS1M--wmQUWHTqaxp4dHq5HVjh7GSzycsOjRNE0XFnQOkDiJ)

Thank you for standing with President Trump and with me. Together, we’re going to keep Georgia the best place to live, work, and raise a family—and we’re going to win this race.

-Burt Jones
Candidate For Governor

| | Paid for by
BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA INC.

name: Katie Porter
subject: A quick check-in (and two recipes)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)
Peter, it’s been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail, and I won’t sugarcoat it—some of it difficult to hear.
But last night, I got a small, much-needed reset.
After nearly a week of my kids figuring out dinner for themselves (yes, that means plenty of Del Taco, grilled cheese, and leftovers), _I finally got back in the kitchen._
Cooking has always been one of the ways I take care of my family—and honestly, myself too.
So I made a couple of our go-to favorites: **my sister’s French Onion soup, and my daughter Betsy’s snickerdoodles.**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)
Nothing fancy. Just good, simple food that brings everyone to the table. And if you add a green salad or whatever you’ve got on hand, you’ve got yourself a great meal.
I wanted to share these recipes with you, because this campaign isn’t just about speeches and headlines. Sometimes, it’s about the everyday moments that remind us what we’re fighting for.
**You can chip in here to get these recipes:**
* **[French Onion Soup](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)**
* **[Betsy’s Snickerdoodle Cookies](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)**

Thank you,
Katie
P.S. If you’re able to **[chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you to my campaign, I’d be so honored.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)** This campaign is powered by people like you, and as governor, I’ll fight every day to make California more affordable for working families. I’m grateful to have you with me in this.
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&t=7&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=&t=8&refcode2=41207_3422442_hfd_BZ&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41207&t=9&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41207)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41207&t=10&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Darin Harbick
subject: Darin Harbick - Church Votes Matter Movement - 4/24/26
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harbick for Oregon ID 23118
body:
With the 2026 session over, it's time to encourage churches and Christians to vote in the May primary

| | | | | [|
---](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=12497fd494&e=3362c31595)
| | Peter,

Hello from Darin!
The 2026 Oregon legislative session is now over, and thank you so much for everyone that prayed for us. Over 22 churches even came to my office in person!
Now our work shifts to encouraging churches and Christians to vote in the very important May election. I am proud to announce our new election focus for this May primary:
It’s called the “**Church Votes Matter** ” movement!
****
---
[|
---](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=f4051b30cd&e=3362c31595)
| |

It’s been said that over 30% of church attenders in Oregon are not registered to vote, and we want to encourage churches to register Christian to vote for this May primary. Imagine if all the churches in Lane County would pray, stand up for their convictions, and then vote!
We are visiting churches and asking for people and pastors to volunteer with us to help register people to vote, and to ask a couple of other church attenders to wave signs at their church on the three Sundays before the election by smiling, waving, being friendly, and letting them know “Church Votes Matters!”
**If you’re interested,** can you respond to this email, with your church name, and we will help you get started. We are especially looking for people to help in Lane County at Ekklesia, First Baptist, Joy Church, Northwood, and Twin Rivers Baptist, who all have multiple services.

Also, we are excited to support several conservative candidates in our area!
Please go to their website, sign up as a volunteer to pray, post a sign, or even wave signs as we get closer to the election.
Jake Pelroy - East Lane Commissioner [https://www.pelroy.com/ ](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=b54a85bc95&e=3362c31595)
Dave Lovell - Springfield Commissioner [https://www.loveallforspringfield.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=660c29a550&e=3362c31595)
Jack Tibbetts - Oregon Senate District 6 [https://www.tibbettsfororegon.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=d6161fc07a&e=3362c31595)
Adam Wilson - Oregon Representative District 7 [https://www.wilsonforspringfield.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=5a4498601d&e=3362c31595)
Ryan Ceniga - West Lane Commissioner - [https://www.ryanceniga.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=17ab1dac3c&e=3362c31595)
Thank you again for helping - we can’t do it without your prayers and support. Please reach out to me if I can be of any service!

---
| | | | | |
Darin Harbick

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting for Election Integrity
body:
Fraud Crackdown Faces Opposition

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH PURSUES FAIR ELECTIONS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37654&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9SQzcyMUV2cWY4OD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=115fda81cb042d8115e5a640628250d30ad808d69770eba3d1787c9dcd11bea4]

In January, the Supreme Court of the United States agreed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=36862&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtdmljdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=de636c6707638922dd9e766bf7322dceeb9b555f08c46cc6b4e1b808dae9061c]
with us that Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors had
standing to challenge an Illinois law that allowed the counting of
ballots up to two weeks after election day.

Now with midterm elections looming and controversy
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37656&F=T&&hash=93215e78ece137f0b60b059207936e086ddf7c3f2fba8a7f5099be90c0f2ee86]
over the conduct of the redistricting election in Virginia, we are
anticipating victory in our latest case for _one_ election day. Our
chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, recounts
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGlzdG9yaWMtZGF5LWF0LXRoZS1zdXByZW1lLWNvdXJ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5a554b8227a190207b2dbc5502cb508888486a1ef5653b9571a91e024026b849] in
_Investigative Bulletin _our significant accomplishments in court.

> Judicial Watch was at the Supreme Court on Monday, March 23,
> fighting
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37415&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1hcmd1bWVudC1vbi1tYXJjaC0yMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=87e58d9275fd7bdd0ab7429e8654c731a5006840db6b8ee01017b047d0316aee]
> for a critical legal determination: Election Day is a day—not five
> days, not a week, not a month.
>
> After filing the brief in February Judicial Watch President Tom
> Fitton said
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37102&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1icmllZi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b228433e5e2d34983ed4d9c6cd22e8f3c97279497fbf2b0e1a350c7988cdbdc8],
> “This is the most important Supreme Court election integrity case
> in a generation. The pandemic spread of states counting late ballots
> received after Election Day is a flagrant violation of long-standing
> federal law that not only encourages voter fraud but also severely
> undermines public confidence in our elections. The Supreme Court now
> has a critical opportunity to restore a fundamental guardrail to the
> election process.”
>
> More than fifteen states allow late-arriving ballots
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37424&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmNzbC5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb25zLWFuZC1jYW1wYWlnbnMvdGFibGUtMTEtcmVjZWlwdC1hbmQtcG9zdG1hcmstZGVhZGxpbmVzLWZvci1hYnNlbnRlZS1tYWlsLWJhbGxvdHM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3028b3d9b255fd9aa49df13b46f4d835bbc7276c24517e3a132a86d7ac85ab72]
> to be counted. Judicial Watch asked the Supreme Court to uphold a
> ruling by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, which
> struck down as unconstitutional a Mississippi law allowing election
> officials up to five days to count mail-in ballots received after
> Election Day. Mississippi appealed, arguing that late-arriving,
> postmarked ballots were permissible.
>

> of Mississippi, was later consolidated

> with a similar challenge by the Republican National Committee and

> Clement made the historic opening statement on behalf of Judicial

> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37425&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS90b21maXR0b24vc3RhdHVzLzIwMzYyNDUyOTAxNTY0NDIwMjA/cz00MyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=eac61d75406e810f1ab56377684b7e7f2ef0b025d00a94940a39d44f15f1a370].

>
> JW’s brief to the Supreme Court
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37089&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3dhdHNvbi12LXJlcHVibGljYW4tbmF0aW9uYWwtY29tbWl0dGVlLXNjb3R1cy1icmllZi0wMDAzNy0xMjYwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d6b1274ced4c1855dd698ab8a09a33d45d941248c6e83f6c76cbffdc2c0e8b40]
> makes the case for a single Election Day. There is no historic
> foundation for counting ballots arriving after Election Day, JW
> notes. The opportunities for fraud are endless, and public
> confidence in elections is eroded.
>
> “The whole point of the federal Election-Day statutes is to set a
> single uniform day for the election,” the brief notes. “Allowing
> ballots to trickle in days or weeks after Election Day is
> antithetical to that basic goal.”
>
> Congress set an Election Day, not an Election Week or an Election
> Month. “Through the federal Election-Day statutes, Congress
> exercised its constitutional authority to set a uniform time for
> federal elections to occur. Text, historical practice, precedent,
> and common sense all demonstrate that those statutes set the
> deadline by which ballots must be submitted and received. Simply
> put, the ballot box closes on Election Day, and ballots that are not
> received until days or weeks after the date specified by Congress
> arrive after Election Day and should not be counted.”
>
> It’s been a busy year for Judicial Watch at the Supreme Court. In
> January, the court granted standing
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=36862&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtdmljdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=de636c6707638922dd9e766bf7322dceeb9b555f08c46cc6b4e1b808dae9061c]
> in a historic case JW filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and

> with convictions for murder, sexual assault, domestic violence and

> loudly about the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border

> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=33711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVycm9yaXN0LXRocmVhdC10by11cy1za3lyb2NrZXRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=828002323ae63fc7b3db509f5bc0dd39ec6c22908b2c7a62cc34bec64e867624]

> this administration despite serious resistance from local sanctuary

> stories about ICE’s public safety mission, the brave men and women

clean_body: Fraud Crackdown Faces Opposition [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH PURSUES FAIR ELECTIONS [] In January, the Supreme Court of the United States agreed [] with us that Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors had standing to challenge an Illinois law that allowed the counting of ballots up to two weeks after election day. Now with midterm elections looming and controversy [] over the conduct of the redistricting election in Virginia, we are anticipating victory in our latest case for one election day. Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, recounts [] in Investigative Bulletin our significant accomplishments in court. Judicial Watch was at the Supreme Court on Monday, March 23, fighting [] for a critical legal determination: Election Day is a day—not five days, not a week, not a month. After filing the brief in February Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said [], “This is the most important Supreme Court election integrity case in a generation. The pandemic spread of states counting late ballots received after Election Day is a flagrant violation of long-standing federal law that not only encourages voter fraud but also severely undermines public confidence in our elections. The Supreme Court now has a critical opportunity to restore a fundamental guardrail to the election process.” More than fifteen states allow late-arriving ballots [] to be counted. Judicial Watch asked the Supreme Court to uphold a ruling by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, which struck down as unconstitutional a Mississippi law allowing election officials up to five days to count mail-in ballots received after Election Day. Mississippi appealed, arguing that late-arriving, postmarked ballots were permissible. The original JW lawsuit, brought on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, was later consolidated [] with a similar challenge by the Republican National Committee and others. At the court on Monday, former U.S. Solicitor General Paul Clement made the historic opening statement on behalf of Judicial Watch’s Libertarian Party client. “All agree that elections for federal office have to end on the day of the election specified by Congress,” Clement said []. [] “Nonetheless, Mississippi insists ballots can trickle in days or even weeks after Election Day.” JW’s brief to the Supreme Court [] makes the case for a single Election Day. There is no historic foundation for counting ballots arriving after Election Day, JW notes. The opportunities for fraud are endless, and public confidence in elections is eroded. “The whole point of the federal Election-Day statutes is to set a single uniform day for the election,” the brief notes. “Allowing ballots to trickle in days or weeks after Election Day is antithetical to that basic goal.” Congress set an Election Day, not an Election Week or an Election Month. “Through the federal Election-Day statutes, Congress exercised its constitutional authority to set a uniform time for federal elections to occur. Text, historical practice, precedent, and common sense all demonstrate that those statutes set the deadline by which ballots must be submitted and received. Simply put, the ballot box closes on Election Day, and ballots that are not received until days or weeks after the date specified by Congress arrive after Election Day and should not be counted.” It’s been a busy year for Judicial Watch at the Supreme Court. In January, the court granted standing [] in a historic case JW filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors. The case challenges an Illinois law allowing the counting of ballots received up to fourteen days after the election. The Judicial Watch election integrity team is led by Senior Attorney Robert Popper, who previously served in the Voting Section of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division. JW attorneys T. Russell Nobile and Eric Lee provide critical support for JW’s many landmark legal efforts. [] Tom Fitton reported from outside the Supreme Court [] after the March 23 hearing. The Judicial Watch team had made “historic legal arguments to preserve the idea of Election Day,” he said. Court observers were largely in agreement that a majority of the justices appeared poised to curb late-arriving ballots [ predicting what the Supreme Court will do is a fool’s errand. Some election officials are not waiting. On Thursday, the New York Times reported [] that election administrators in some states had already begun “planning for a world where all ballots must arrive by Election Day.” A decision is expected in June. It is well worth noting that six million inactive names have been removed from voter rolls nationwide due to our efforts. Recently, in Colorado alone, 372,000 ineligible voter names have been removed [] from its voter registration lists following a settlement addressing the state’s compliance with federal voter list maintenance requirements. This is a major victory for election integrity. STATES SUE TO GET BILLIONS OF TAXPAYER DOLLARS As President Trump launches a sweeping crackdown on fraud, waste, and abuse in federal benefit programs, those who benefited from years of lax rules and easy taxpayer dollars are fighting back hard. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] on the new Task Force to Eliminate Fraud — led by Vice President JD Vance — and the fierce resistance from the Left. Twenty Democrat-run states and the District of Columbia are suing the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) over a new policy that prohibits all grant recipients from using taxpayer funds to promote gender ideology, benefit illegal immigrants or on programs that deprive women and girls of fair athletic opportunities or permit male competitive participation in women’s sports. In late December the federal agency that annually disburses tens of billions of dollars in food assistance announced the antidiscrimination rule [] [ states to certify compliance with the new regulations before receiving money for costly welfare programs such food stamps, free school lunch and a special program for low-income women known as Women, Infants and Children (WIC) and their kids under the age of five. The states suing over the new requirements receive over $74 billion annually from the USDA and they want their federal funds while still supporting the biased leftist policies of the previous administration. The new Trump administration policy is unconstitutional, according to their lawsuit [], which alleges that the conditions are vague, arbitrary, coercive and unrelated to the federal interest. The complaint also accuses the USDA of exceeding its legal authority and imposing the measure without following required legal procedure. The agency has “thrown unconstitutional and unlawful roadblocks between the programs created by Congress and the States that rely on them, threatening critical nutrition support, vital agricultural research, and the safety of our national food chain and communities,” according to the complaint, which also accuses the USDA of imposing extraneous and unreasoned conditions on all programs, grants and cooperative agreements. The lawsuit further alleges that the spending clause of the U.S. Constitution requires that “funding condition be communicated with sufficient clarity that it can be accepted knowingly and voluntarily, and it prohibits coercive conditions that place a gun to the head of recipients that cannot forgo critical funding.” The “ambiguous, coercive conditions” advanced by the USDA “undermine the status of the States as independent sovereigns in our federal system,” the complaint states. Among the officials suing the USDA is New York Attorney General Letitia James, who was federally indicted [] [ year with bank fraud and making false statements to a financial institution. She says millions of New Yorkers depend on government assistance to put food on the table and their benefits could be threatened or delayed. “The federal government cannot hold critical funding hostage to force states to comply with vague, ideological directives,” James said in a statement [] [ the lawsuit. The other states suing are California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Michigan, Minnesota, New Jersey, New Mexico, Oregon, Rhode Island, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin. New Jersey Attorney General Jennifer Davenport [], who has previously filed five lawsuits “challenging unlawful grant conditions imposed by the Trump Administration” confidently asserts that the president cannot make “cruel funding restrictions” that, she says in this case will result in people going hungry. Connecticut Attorney General William Tong [] says the administration’s immigration, diversity, equity, inclusion, and gender identity policies are unrelated to the purpose of USDA funding. “Trump’s message to Connecticut—fall in line with extreme MAGA ideology, or your families go hungry,” Tong said. “Trump wants states to sign hateful pledges that have absolutely nothing to do with food assistance.” The updated USDA funding policy is part of broader initiatives launched by President Trump early last year to defend women from gender ideology extremism and restore biological truth to the federal government and end the taxpayer subsidization of open borders []. Under the first measure the federal government will “defend women’s rights and protect freedom of conscience by using clear and accurate language and policies that recognize women are biologically female, and men are biologically male,” according to a presidential order []. The second aims to prevent taxpayer resources from acting as a magnet and fueling illegal immigration to the United States by ensuring that no taxpayer-funded benefits go to unqualified aliens. States only need to comply with the new rules to receive their billions in USDA funds. TRUMP IS RIDDING OUR STREETS OF ILLEGAL ALIEN CHILD SEX OFFENDERS Criminal illegal aliens make headlines almost daily for their crimes against Americans. Thankfully, the Trump administration has ended the previous policy of accommodating sanctuary jurisdictions that shield these offenders from federal immigration enforcement. As a result, our children are safer now. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] the details. In yet another noteworthy immigration enforcement accomplishment ignored by establishment media, the Trump administration nearly doubled the number of illegal alien child sex offenders arrested during Biden’s last year in a U.S. city known to be a cesspool of undocumented criminals. In Trump’s first year back in the White House, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) apprehended 414 criminal alien child predators in Houston, Texas compared to just 211 under the last administration’s final year in office. The recently arrested criminal aliens accounted for 761 child sex offenses and 525 other serious crimes ranging from homicide to robbery, according to an announcement [] issued this week by ICE, the 20,000-employee Department of Homeland Security (DHS) agency created after 9/11 to enforce immigration laws and preserve national security. The latest roundup of child predators comes on the heels of two separate operations in Houston less than a year ago in which more than 1,000 dangerous criminal aliens were apprehended in the area, which is estimated to be home to more than half a million illegal immigrants. In the first effort ICE arrested over 350 gang members with 1,700 criminal convictions [] who entered the U.S. illegally more than 1,400 times. Most belonged to violent gangs, including the renowned Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), Tren de Aragua, Latin Kings,15th Street Gang, Sureños, Paisas and Tango Blast and were convicted of serious crimes including homicide, sexual assault of a child, drug and sex trafficking and unlawful possession of a firearm. A few weeks later, in a separate Houston crackdown, federal authorities nabbed another 822 illegal immigrant offenders [] with convictions for murder, sexual assault, domestic violence and driving while intoxicated among other crimes. The figures spoke loudly about the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border policies that welcomed a record-breaking 7.6 million illegal aliens, including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records and more than 1.7 million [] from countries that DHS determined pose a national security threat to the U.S. There has been incredible progress in a little over a year under this administration despite serious resistance from local sanctuary governments that protect illegal immigrants, an increasingly powerful leftist movement, and its allies in the mainstream media. “While elected officials and media pundits across the country were zealously trying to manipulate the American public with fake news stories about ICE’s public safety mission, the brave men and women of ICE were quietly going about their business to arrest and remove more than 400 dangerous child predators from our local communities,” said the director of ICE’s Houston field office, Gabriel Martinez, this week. “Thanks to their tireless efforts, parents across Southeast Texas can sleep a little better tonight knowing that these pedophiles and child rapists are no longer a threat to their children.” The ICE Houston field office is responsible for immigration enforcement operations in 58 southeastern Texas counties situated in the state’s gulf coast from Beaumont to Corpus Christi and the Houston/Galveston area out to Waco. The busy ICE office reveals that this operation was a team effort assisted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), U.S. Marshals Service and Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA). Among the child sex offenders rounded up in Houston in the last year are Alex Samuel Lara Diaz, a 35-year-old previously deported Honduran wanted in his native country for homicide and convicted in the U.S. of aggravated sexual assault of a minor. Gabriel Julio Lopez-Velazquez, a 25-year-old Mexican who entered the U.S. illegally four times has been convicted of aggravated sexual assault of a minor, aggravated assault, and illegal entry and twice for felony illegal reentry. Another Mexican, 48-year-old Juan Leonardo Garcia Ibarra, illegally entered the U.S. a dozen times and has been convicted of sexual indecency with a child, aggravated assault, cruelty toward a child and driving under the influence. Milton Alexander Magana Fuentes, a 32-year-old from El Salvador, entered the U.S. illegally four times and has been convicted of sexual indecency with a minor and failure to register as a sex offender. Luis Mario Monsalve Chaux, a 52-year-old Colombian, has convictions for possession of child sexual abuse material, four burglaries, and twice for larceny. The list is extensive and includes mug shots of the perpetrators. name: Kathy Hochul
subject: Let me pull back the curtain
body:
| Let me pull back the curtain.

**FIRST:** Trump’s handpicked lackey, Bruce Blakeman, announced his campaign for Governor to turn New York red.

**THEN:** Special interest billionaires met with Trump at the White House to scheme to take me down.

**NOW:** Blakeman launched $900,000 worth of attack ads against me — and I need your help fighting back.

[I’ll get right to it: We can’t let Blakeman’s attacks go unanswered. So, could you pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — between my campaign and Voter Protection Project before my critical End of Month Deadline to help me fight back, counter the special interest cash, and put an end to Republicans’ schemes? I’m counting on you more than you know.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107818?t=6&akid=23861%2E878179%2EpHm3i_)

Here’s the deal:

**Bruce Blakeman, Donald Trump, and their MAGA donors are plotting to flip New York red and unravel all the progress we’ve made.**

I won’t let that happen — but I can’t fight back alone.

So I need you to make a critical choice:

We can either sit back, watch Bruce Blakeman and his MAGA donors flood this race with special interest cash, and put everything we’ve fought so hard for at risk...

...Or we can fight back with a surge of grassroots support, hand Trump and Blakeman an embarrassing loss, and keep Republican extremism out of New York once and for all. [So I’m humbly asking: Can I count on you to step up and rush in $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project before my End of Month Deadline? I need all hands on deck.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107818?t=7&akid=23861%2E878179%2EpHm3i_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107819?t=8&akid=23861%2E878179%2EpHm3i_)

[**Can you donate $25, $100, or $500 now?**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=30ef4e7b3e&e=bbdb764b3a)

| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE TODAY](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=63842b928a&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | [VOLUNTEER](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=c066a9efc0&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [RSVP for May Volunteer Day on Saturday May 2nd!](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=2597a43d0e&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| |

[**Volunteer in your area! Tables in Seattle, Renton, Kent, Federal Way and more!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=72d8aff2bc&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Our Kshama for Congress April Volunteer Day had more than double the turnout of our successful March one! Over 30 people came from all over the district! Some even came from further, including Olympia and Sammamish.
We had tables set up all across the Seattle area in Washington’s 9th Congressional District. This included the light rail stations at Judkins Park, Othello, and Columbia City, as well as a number of other locations. Some volunteers also went out to put up posters for our [May 9th Central District Town Hall at Casa Latina](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=e96092d583&e=bbdb764b3a), featuring the call to Fund Healthcare, Not War!
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=615d6c3444&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
We raised over $800 in small donations from working people, as well as getting over 150 signatures to get Kshama Sawant on the ballot. We’re getting close to the deadline for filing and making a final push to collect as many signatures as we can. Every signature gathered right now shows the overwhelming support there is for Kshama Sawant in this district. The vast majority of candidates don’t even think of collecting signatures to get on the ballot and instead pay the fee, but this campaign is different. Not only are we confident that working people support us, the opportunity to talk with thousands of them and get them engaged with this campaign is one we wouldn’t want to pass up!

We’ll be holding a rally and turning in the signatures at the Secretary of State’s Office in Olympia on May 4th at 8am. If you’re able to come, please [RSVP to attend](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=c3322709ea&e=bbdb764b3a) and join us!

As always, we found enormous support on Volunteer Day for Kshama’s record of winning historic victories for working people and our campaign’s demands for:
* Free Healthcare for All — Tax the Rich!
* End All Military Aid to Israel — End the Occupation of Palestine! No Weapons
or Tech for Genocide or Imperialist War!
* Stop the Deportations — Shut Down ICE and The Detention Centers!
* National Rent Control & Build Millions of Affordable Homes

---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=1d5bdb03a9&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
At Judkins Park we held a rally and canvassing training while snacks, water, and canvassing locations were distributed. In the over 10 months we’ve been campaigning, our volunteers have found that working people strongly support our demands and the historic track record of Kshama Sawant’s city council office. Working people are also horrified by Adam Smith’s horrendous votes for funding the genocide in Gaza, for the Iraq War, for creating ICE, and for massive cuts to Medicare and Medicaid. For many volunteers this was their first time canvassing for our campaign, or any campaign in general, but after a short training they soon found success!
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=5224f139d8&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
Towards the end of the day it felt like everyone in Columbia City and Judkins Park had already gotten a flyer in their hand. Working people in the neighborhoods were impressed at our ability to be at so many different locations at the same time. Even people driving by seeing our placards with demands like “Free Healthcare for All! Tax the Rich!” or “No War With Iran! Fund Healthcare Not War!” sometimes rolled down their windows to ask for a flyer or brochure.
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=317b93057f&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
There were folks from all walks of life who came out to volunteer. Our current volunteers have become strong canvassers, and we’re gaining more fresh faces as the campaign heats up, but it’s going to take thousands of us canvassing to win this. In addition to canvassing face-to-face, we have people from all over the country phonebanking. There have even been a number of neighborhood tables outside of Washington state in places like Peoria, IL, New York City, and the Bay Area. No matter where you are, there are ways you can volunteer for this campaign. We have volunteers who are disabled, who have children at home, or who are just plain nervous to talk to people. Our experienced campaign organizers are able to help you out at whatever activity you sign up for. We have volunteer opportunities virtually every day, and you can [sign up here at any time!](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=05eb736fca&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=41db2b0d31&e=bbdb764b3a)
| | A huge thanks to everyone who made it out with us on April 18th! We have a historic opportunity to elect the first-ever revolutionary socialist to Congress, let’s continue to fight to win this election!
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=0e7aba9c08&e=bbdb764b3a)
| [|

| [|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=322665533d&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |

[**We’ll be having our next volunteer day on Saturday May 2nd, starting at 11:00 am. Join us!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=32a9407049&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| |

**HELP ELECT KSHAMA SAWANT AS THE FIRST-EVER REVOLUTIONARY SOCIALIST TO THE U.S. CONGRESS!**
---
| |

[**Can you donate $25, $100, or $500 now?**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=37251d9348&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **Donate to elect the first-ever revolutionary socialist to the U.S. Congress!**
Help build our independent movement to shut down ICE and stop the deportations, for a $25/hour minimum wage, to end U.S. military aid to Israel, for free healthcare for all by taxing the rich, for national rent control, and for a new party for the working class!
[**Donate $25, $100, or $500 now!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=b03db93bbb&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=1b7cba4f7b&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | **Volunteer to build our fighting grassroots campaign!**
We have a real shot to win this campaign, but the Democratic Party will fight tooth and nail to keep Kshama out of Congress because they know she is a real fighter for working people. We need everyone to get involved to get the word out in order to defeat them!
[**Sign up to volunteer with our campaign today!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=31f6aff0ed&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=17d7c727a1&e=bbdb764b3a)
---

subject: Three Progressive Superstars Race to See Who Can Chase Away the Most Taxpayers First
body:
In a dazzling display of progressive excellence, Governors Gavin Newsom, Wes Moore, and Mayor Zohran Mamdani are locked in an unofficial competition to see who can drive the most productive residents out of their jurisdictions the fastest, sources have confirmed. Maryland’s Governor Wes “Tax” Moore is making a strong late push, having just raised taxes [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/um81C4avA1uag0TlwBITmw)

Maryland’s Governor Wes “Tax” Moore is making a strong late push, having just raised taxes [...]

# **[A Boy's Comic Reimagines Mom as Villain in Tender Tale](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Quick Smiles: Stacy Goulding was surprised to learn she was the antagonist in her 9-year-old son’s comic book, The Emerald Warrior. Her son created a character called “No Mom” after she couldn’t take him to a restaurant right after his birthday. Goulding said the playful story made her laugh and showed off her son’s creativity [...]

A Democratic lawmaker was quietly investigated by the House Ethics Committee for allegedly pursuing an “inappropriate relationship” with a staffer — but the probe never substantiated the claims and was closed without releasing any public findings. name: The Flyover
subject: Storm Strikes Sooners, Furyk Captains Ryder Cup, and Kellogg's Goes Nostalgic
body:
A [confirmed EF-3 tornado](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdCB7sU0oXPwNXf72SrTB6-CLYSPbCcrbn7hXuG6kkWb0fV_X-Yoxxf3-HzdyNfC801ES1Up5LpXzVmqODyqFeadcwit_HssMEmwrdQtm9hjTZ9aNd4EIqG_IqWEYlFLW2GZ1ftQyGKSb7EcNN8JeXrRCBSagxME20Z1rUoNRUg696UZvw6LRjCAtmMsitCQfK-fum-NeVwrpw2_K3cJbk9xa67OI_p-AScB0HEe33MpJcfYCpjMKmCrnHT23mTGXtq6ZX_e1fWKupeXQ8iPhyhsKmJrs_POIKcViB6HlfcOYfs_qnwy9HfwEAAD__yzYfFk) tore through Enid, Oklahoma, Thursday night, destroying homes and forcing Vance Air Force Base to close.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO2zAQBk9DdRb4EmUVLAII7v60KQlKXNob8yGQlA3l9IESOBdIOzsYLL4fX-bLYsB0_24j6OazSfCuAVqDYmrLJdZW8Am15pygVL-X47kaTrm6UHnhg3EWw2Fk57QH4CA60GwcR8aYGlT30J4KPzC2TPa6wNXJdRSTlJNwnjKrpqVDfdao5AOjdBRDPznlV2mHiVPFh-tKJAWHLZf-Z8bUHuDDkV9Q-jXHLuhHa1sl4hvhN8JvmF5QWx-zg5gXDHBaRNz2Fk3Ne1mBiNlnyhQjXJ10tXGzeE9EzAkopR8eweEeiZi3gtGW46Pn1CA1ImaLxhdIv85LSzZC_Ze-_C11RbvtjSFgVSOR9B4thj9vt__a-qX57wAAAP__SOiT0w) | |
# Saturday, April 25, 2026
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1901, New York passed a state law requiring the initials of a car's owner to be posted on the back of the vehicle. These were America's first license plates, largely homemade. ([See Photo](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb_G7sYCjLFfQZHG3Uub0uLBsCaLmQ3MruW_jzZKviDd1dXV1dH58bl9upRTuX13B1qOtBU8W0ZmrFtjqkfjmu7YGlHB2uKzXne_KaEMCA1q2oJL-dp0H2xEVDj2aOU8z1JKM5l-t4uKIX4tUiupvB61jHI2zsx-QbOMYeyTfb8JrSYpxDxOw0cw0Ws3fShh1LT4TgsMiakOPykV3jHmi15YB09Hn-3O_OjGb51aO7We5zlQDuVietb2XnRqpQK8pwbBXZAKUA5Q8ISL6r1T678IjR0jfKGnAxvEVBv_7Zig4q9nqgg5eSwN4ZEdYwMq4F1tfbXhcaacUzNzp8XtcCn_4eP_kvqy6ncAAAD__-jQj4g))

If you grew up digging through a box of cereal for a hidden prize, you'll want to check out today's _Et Cetera_ section. [Kellogg's](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAUhZ8Gb0Rw-UsGhnbwli4dOloYrh1qbCIgSf32lfsKXc-Rjs73fV2Hq4spbvOHW9G2KQ8bvmrC1rAMteWy1lbigrXmvGGp06Psix-AgaZMUlBDcDHtg-yCnRABRYeWG2M451rp7mZHp0bH4TxyJbiXwQkW1MXws5YG3ai7aI81JkFxxoxQp0vQk5dOXYBpUGdPJMMQWy6n7xy3dsMp7fmJ5eTz2iV7a-1eiXgj0BPo3egPgqMj0L8_atywVgL9Kxb8bLnsBPoFU8rzTO-P1uI205b3SkfnF-qxoEt0zD9Yj5geDnbKBQiQBkRXbLi_YkqxakMkm1cX09-R9i97Twu_AQAA___3M4WD) is bringing back its in-box toy promotion for the first time in years. What was your favorite cereal box prize growing up? Reply to this email and let us know. Would you believe the firing squad is making a comeback in 2026? The Justice Department just made a major move to reshape the death penalty while also reversing the Biden administration's freeze on federal executions. When was the last time a firing squad was actually used in the U.S.? How soon could this new policy be put into place? And who could it apply to? On today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Amy Hess answers all your questions and breaks down the latest on this developing story. [Tune in here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz1uKyEUQOHVQOfR5fJnFxSvcefXpkQELjYxM1hA7Mzuo2QLWcA50vd28ZdQatmu_8NKbubmN3qNSnNS92O2vo7Zy53GaG2jPvJn3-_RI6A5gDqg9imUunvFk8tESJKTE9ZaIYTRht8cBgUyWJMtKElZ0JFyOgYAaSRFHXlxPzdQqAWAlXo5JZOjCvqEYFAfI1NAqczWl49WtnmjXPf2pL7EtvLqbnM-BpP_GJ4Znju997Clpe4Mz4-W6Gv2IHh36fEqtZZhLFNwXUOpv_38E_rp8DsAAP__wXFr6A)!

Today's sponsor, [Mode Mobile](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO2zAQBk9DdRb4EmUVLAII7v60KQlKXNob8yGQlA3l9IESOBdIOzsYLL4fX-bLYsB0_24j6OazSfCuAVqDYmrLJdZW8Am15pygVL-X47kaTrm6UHnhg3EWw2Fk57QH4CA60GwcR8aYGlT30J4KPzC2TPa6wNXJdRSTlJNwnjKrpqVDfdao5AOjdBRDPznlV2mHiVPFh-tKJAWHLZf-Z8bUHuDDkV9Q-jXHLuhHa1sl4hvhN8JvmF5QWx-zg5gXDHBaRNz2Fk3Ne1mBiNlnyhQjXJ10tXGzeE9EzAkopR8eweEeiZi3gtGW46Pn1CA1ImaLxhdIv85LSzZC_Ze-_C11RbvtjSFgVSOR9B4thj9vt__a-qX57wAAAP__SOiT0w), is turning everyday smartphone usage into a new income stream while giving users a stake in the rapidly growing data economy behind today's AI boom.

|
---
## Tornado Tears through Oklahoma
A [confirmed EF-4 tornado](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdCB7sU0oXPwNXf72SrTB6-CLYSPbCcrbn7hXuG6kkWb0fV_X-Yoxxf3-HzdyNfC801ES1Up5LpXzVmqODyqFeadcwit_HssMEmwrdQtm9hjTZ9aNd4EIqG_IqWEYlFLW2GZ1ftQyGKSb7EcNN8JeXrRCBSagxME20Z1rUoNRUg696UZvw6LRjCAtmMsitCQfK-fum-NeVwrpw2_K3cJbk9xa67OI_p-AScB0HEe33MpJcfYCpjMKmCrnHT23mTGXtq6ZX_e1fWKupeXQ8iPhyhsKmJrs_POIKcViB6HlfcOYfs_qnwy9HfwEAAD__yzYfFk) tore through Enid, Oklahoma, on Thursday night, destroying homes and forcing Vance Air Force Base to close. The twister hit the city of about 50,000 just before 9 p.m. local time, leveling homes in the Gray Ridge neighborhood and trapping residents under debris. At least 40 homes were damaged, and first responders conducted door-to-door searches through the night. [See photos and videos of the storm here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp_G3rAAY5MMDF28pWtHi-BLTANcC27i-O2r_rxB10-fjo7Ox2W-2BBDvr3bBIY8zhn2GoEIylwJS6pUwh1qRcxQqn-U4-5myeXIuGJymBcb4jGrdjEeQELfghFaayHEOIztahQHpbT2SggtBtVf3Yk7569Kgz73174N5pvGlRwE57ofuvMyeqfscJZ8lMPJNYrDEghL94kh0wo-HviE0jlMbTQr0Vab_q2RUyOnfd87j68dLK2_l0ZO8KICCdjf2siJsGS7ICthq4zWgo_byvAe7YrJMocpPXKgg_lQKrECdcO8QKnMOgqY22KWbQ8xhjrqRvFbsiH--NC_Ij6N_AoAAP__t02K1g). Enid's mayor said 10 to 15 people suffered injuries, but remarkably, no fatalities have been reported. Vance, the Air Force's [fourth-busiest airfield](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2q2zAUhJ9G3inozz9ZaJFL8e4WSildGkU6jtXIOkFHicjbF99XuMuZgWHm-_u5fLqYYr79dDvYuuKSoVGCWqEsVLHsVEu8AxFihkLrs7zvflFCDVwYrvoluJjei-mCXQEU6A6sHMdRSjn0Q7fZXugrXJ1eJ6XlVQ7BnL2eJiO8hwnAdNEebcKoXgox6v50DsPqjevPSgyqnzwzAkKsWE7_MOa6wZre-IJy8rh3yW61PojpC1MzU3Nr7bRTPjKmZsj8SYcLrm5QmJorPo5bEehLlOwC8gQvSMTxntyGu-Mb7kDcEW9YqHLvCDh5yK5E5M2VHPONR6InBKZmV_jlouSH_vOL6Rl9DEz_-DiYQqPfUB5dseHRYkqRhpEZcdtdTF_r67eQv6z6HwAA___5U5jv), remained without power and water Friday morning. More severe storms are expected across Oklahoma through Saturday.
## Soldier Bet on Secret Raid, Won $400K
A U.S. Special Forces [master sergeant was arrested](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAUBOCnwR0WPuYnLihu4y633dIicIhJwERAYnmffuV9he1GGukbab6uy9WEGLb7f5NQN5-XDfcasTUsS225pNpKeGKtOW9Yqn-X42kXYCAp4xTE4kyIx8I7pz0i4NihHpRSwzBIIbtVO2tRoh_BM88dOgtOSD6Zi5JyuinWBX1qjIMYGFOj6CcnveVGTMAkiIslnKELLZf-kcPWVvTxyB8svc2pi3pt7VXJ-I_ATGDe9723282eJYH5pAnMjJ95JDC7_KA1Rxew0FeORzLliY3esFX6wQ2_3xgNTca9S-7XlmJXtHvtIcZQpSKc3ZMJ8Xe6_emvj4afAAAA__9_D4AX) Thursday for allegedly using classified intelligence about the capture mission of Venezuelan leader Nicolas Maduro to win more than $400,000 on prediction market Polymarket. Gannon Ken Van Dyke, 38, helped plan [Operation Absolute Resolve](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSgyAUAL8GOxxA0VhQXGOXa690EB76EhQHnnHy9zeXX7h2i52d_blPd4sR9-XbbmAopGmHq0QggjwVSnkrlPEJpaS0Qy7hzO-nm5RQHRctV3ryFuN7aitvAoCCpgIj-76XUna6q1Yzz3JQdtZyFm6-Wd9rrTV0vXcCVDPICs2fTbRKSyH6RteD74JrrR6U6JS-OdYK8Egp14-EO60Q4ju9INcubVU0K9FRWPPF1MjUeF1X_TgLoYN6SS-mxnRYpsYjMzWehZcUPULmbrV5Ac_PgvvCXbSlYEDwHPeQ8mYJ086PnAISPzJ4dB-y2fwE4jNQqbLxx4UxYul61oplsxg_TfSvkS-jfgMAAP__3ImL0g) and signed nondisclosure agreements before creating a Polymarket account and placing 13 bets totaling $33,000 in the days before the January raid on Caracas. Van Dyke then tried to cover his tracks, [moving his winnings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdLMygw2PwsUqEd2L0qVExh5gssZ-ss2i_ftok09Ic5srXd1zfn3On5YDx-2HPcjUNc2RrhKoVspzqSkfpWZ-UCkpRcplPfPr4WaU2INUgHr2lsNrVo03KxFS15Bph2Fo27bXfbObwWr1YfXg1bKMfeedl9YqtyhaOmxH3bB5r0mFupVy6PRt9P3qlNUjyh71hxNKkuea8u134lh3WsMrPSnfXDqaYPZav4ro7gIngdN1XbejxHcncKIIZxE4vaEETue_gJKCZ8rgdps38nBx3eEsHDdwwZbCK5MHjpUC1AQXR1BSPiBFOKw_c4Js2QMX8CcBR3DpzFXgZDPc79h-__bTN9n4r4tD4NIPQsntsBz-Xq7_5flp8E8AAAD__-R6k94) to a foreign cryptocurrency vault and asking Polymarket to delete his account. He faces up to 20 years in prison on the top charge of wire fraud.
## Home Improvement Stores Ranked
Lowe's is America's [top-rated home improvement retailer](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3SAQRb8Gd7ZgbMx7BUUad5s2pcWawZAFxoLJW_nvo10pX5DySvdeHZ1fb_ubSznV86craDnQXvGzZ2TGtnemVjq39IG9E1VsPfxp98exg4R1lMsIevcu5XtfBm8DIuA8oFXGGKXUqtchWuW0QTjAHI-g3sH552yCC495cbN8GD0k-_UmF9BKSjPr6enXcCxOP0GuoB-HWCT6xNSm35QqRwz5phe26aAyZBuZry7mHwI2AVuPdF2pntPtItFXRcAWqeB4uuax_kupXI1eWLCygM01TkfGLmCrxGN07Z3aGBqmM_L4PfB4EY9KKi3l-pRT5JKHZv31mXJOfTVikWdxKX9j8X-5fFn4GwAA__9ufYpk), according to a recent customer satisfaction study, dethroning previous winners Menards and Ace Hardware. The study surveyed more than 2,100 customers on factors including price, staff, merchandise, and online experience. Ace Hardware [finished second](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAUAL8Gd1jwDDguKK5xl2uvtDA8x8QYLCBB-fvT7n7C1iPNSPPvvtyNDz4-_poTdd3SErGVgLViXkpN-Sw1-wNLSSliLtsrfw67AANFmaAgF2d8-Cyic3pDBBw61HwcR865kqrbtRwlU0asZgJl1coGYY2RN6lWzs0khs7rLxsTIDlj4yD7yanNCiMnYArkzRLB0Pmacv9MPtYdt_BJb8y9TWcX9F7rVcjwh8BMYG6t9fsrHj-YwAxcgBgkgXnFUunT0Ss1zDSbePj4oCE1LHRPJ1KHV6rUWCQwd1m7q_kQfFEjEexxGh--i_VXm94a_gcAAP__NsN73A), while Menards and Home Depot both scored below the industry average. Overall, [64% of shoppers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMiPTYNgJHFxCtpdeiIzdXnrHYORuBvH3p7n7hE2rVKWn9-dz_nSUaP_67Ta0EvO848UJRbDMLLlsLIWeyJzzjoXjWe6nn0HDoHSvwMzBUbrnvg42IgJ2Ndp2HMe2bQcz1KttBzAP0CMu3eKWHlz48D6a0T8QXFywJvt-0z2YVuuxM80jDNH37r0awHz4qtcYSHJpvjPtsmJMd35haXze6mRXkYOr7lcFUwXTdV3Ndzjy9b-vYFpOph2ZK5iOgsyqYELH-A5Ag1EnqzVvqGg7Sn7hhruoguIoYVHshDg6L5R3xXKGuy42HBelRDyMVa-_NkfpH4v8SODLwt8AAAD__-NIiPc) said they'd definitely return to their preferred store, up nine points from 2024, a jump credited to more proactive employees and customers doing better research online before visiting in person.
|
---
_The following stories are featured exclusively on The Flyover Podcast—a daily show that gives you the most important headlines in under 15 minutes, straight from the heart of the country.**Clicking the link will take you directly to these stories:**_ **➤ Firing squads **are making a comeback. Here's what the Justice Department's major death penalty decision really means. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

There’s literally thousands of houses investors earn monthly income from... | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | Tax Lien List | Have you checked out the from your state? **Good Morning!** On this day in 1838, the United States and the Republic of Texas signed the [Convention of Limits](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAQxvGnwU4DI4IUFLex29ue0owyriQoG5ms69ufuK9wqn_1_Yrv5zE-MKa4P__jRp4_Sx53OksiZjrGGbfXdhWO84ZXyoVSnGkvBCNIMLXUNXRjwJiuUVfBTzI4VZFX1lqltHOyWr01hF1v9LQ4HZSZLRm03WxQaegxTFX0NyY1dErJVvaNlW3fW2rBObnQ4oSWFCLno-GVmD5YlnTlNx3NnLcq-ZX5VUT7T8AgYDjPs-GyYt5T3KnJx1PA8F3VAa96uu4IGGjn464xsjp8eJ0xpViMFVo-N4zpi_PfLnl7-A0AAP__eX51SQ), establishing the western bank of the Sabine River as the eastern boundary of Texas and recognizing the Republic's claims to disputed territory in Red River County. Would you believe the firing squad is making a comeback in 2026? The Justice Department just made a major move to reshape the death penalty while also reversing the Biden administration's freeze on federal executions. When was the last time a firing squad was actually used in the U.S.? How soon could this new policy be put into place? And who could it apply to? On today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Amy Hess answers all your questions and breaks down the latest on this developing story. ## Camp Mystic May Lose License to Reopen
Texas health officials formally notified Camp Mystic on Friday that the Hill Country girls camp may not receive a license to operate this summer, nine months after Guadalupe River flooding killed 27. The Department of State Health Services sent [an 11-page letter](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL9utDAQxJ_GdEb2YjAULr6G7r42JTKw3K3iP8h2juPtIy7KE6TaYmdG85uP23Sz5Cjc_1uPpry2OAU8ssNSME2L9bs_c6HF29PFjI4WDBlhAgEdF4pDO62W3DmpajWzWAdZoZFaaynVMIjqYfrZdrJB3fU9WDX3MwhspbZKDaqzrajIXGFCQSulaERfa9H0vcYGhkFsuA1MCVypxFSXBxZ82by5Mz4x1Uv0lTOPUvbMmn8MRgbjcRz158uG68lgvGgYjG_b7-UhFtoIM78A-Q8hj0fAlHncuP9yhXaHfMWNFsKwXFoKnErme4p7zLhy9JjuGJaT784GBmOVzLof5BzlTjMl7t6Se3csf1v2aeA7AAD__-OmkDI) citing multiple deficiencies in the camp's proposed emergency plan and finding it out of compliance with state safety requirements. The agency has reviewed hundreds of complaints about the camp's response on July 4, and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has [pressed the agency](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngQ60Xi8xLlxcQ5drr0QGr4MlG3K2L4S3PyWv8PffzEjz5z7fbYhhf_y2iU19-2Pe-SyRa-U8rzY901VqWJO94lE4hpX3wjgj4K0D6nCYnQ3xmql1ZgGnRctGKKWEIK2h3QzLReLAIAfPN2KyBAMsnlggK82uDeZTBoSDECBh7BXIcVQsUWvw7HVDwC7UI_d148pvW3y8jhfnfj1SG81W67M08leDU4PTeZ4ft_JeOZe__2zmj2tw-kYbnGyuYY08K0QiZ7FDz76jAdZuUQK7ERCBUGpJut9qim027nmGGEO5qYbgkWyI3_H6s8teBv8HAAD__42UfaE) to withhold the permit until legislative and criminal investigations conclude. Texas Rangers are probing neglect allegations, and a court injunction prevents the camp from demolishing flood-damaged cabins while the family of 8-year-old Cecilia "Cile" Steward, whose body has not been found, continues [fighting in court](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO6yAQRb8Gd1gw4GAKite4y2u3tDAMCVqwI8Pa8d-vnOQPtrwzoyOduV_X8WpjivPtv81o6jMs44x7SVgrrqOz-ZGPUqPL9khLwRQdzgVhBAYXyiSFbvQ2pmOUjTcT85o3aLhSinOpNWvuRgjkQUyT4EFxJZzqXIdCu15OTsuJN9GcMCah45wJ1reKib5XKEBrFjBoIhn6WJe1rXes-LQlpGPZcG3dkptk7rU-ChH_CAwEhn3f2-_tB88lgcGuNbqEBIbTi8BQqq1nfIHoZ_gOIS2LJzCc2vTtTbfoasyFBptjiljobudK3_ce5-Mk0M9bCAxw0VSIHl2nPPXKMSqd5bQHLmkIyjqUYepgalbjH3tMKZaLIpLdso3p5VP_1sJm4DcAAP__Uy6b2w).
## ICE Arrests 277 with Criminal Background
ICE's Enforcement and Removal Operations division in Houston arrested [277 illegal immigrants](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u5SAQhZ_G7rjCAzF2QbGNu2y7pYVhiEfCYMEkvt6nX91o3yD1OTo_35_39d1Rovzx2x1o-RnLmvFqCZmxrt4d53E3Jn-4O5WGiTzmhrCChFFILeBtDY7Sveo-2E2GeejRDsaYYdDzLPvdTpPZzOi0gimOADFq5bZtVgqlDsENPdlXmNTwNgxSyelhpJomgwrmWUaMc6clBuJSH7wj49O1mO7yhfXhy9EnuzOfrVO_Olg6WK7resTyhHEvn41Lfpk6WF6vOljIo_gvCFcrNm4CjBG5ZE9MfzE34SsdlF0SFX2poYlWPnlH11h8t4tyYnVMJffVhvOilKiNptPy43CUvlfxz1h-WfgXAAD__-qGjCo) with criminal records during a two-week targeted operation across 58 Southeast Texas counties between April 6 and April 17. Also among those arrested was Minh Duy Tong Nguyen, a 54-year-old Vietnamese national [convicted of murder](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFzhCAUhH8NdjjwRJGCIg3dpU3pcPg4mUNxgJznv8-YyT9I94q3--3u12262RDD9vi0K-r69mna8CgRa8U8Obvu61lqcKs9YyoYg8OtIEzAYKBMUOin2YZ4TqKZ9Z3NijeouZSSc6EUaxZ95731fuiEHzo1Ci4QeTcKtKq3d9HLJujLjAnoOWcdG1vJunGU2IFSzKNXRDCcQ025rQtWfNvi45lemFuX1ibqpda9kO6DgCFgjuNoXQzuCUv6LjVt1xcBc9UiYGJyNhIwF5OAYeK6gYAJDumfgmbcU66FgpTU5oylFnoBaT0SPRCfFDefssMVt0p3zCHNBEyT9bwfIcZQBkkEe6w2xN-Q9X_TvjT8BAAA__-j441U) in Houston in 1991 who had carried a longstanding removal order. ERO Houston Acting Field Office Director Paul McBride warned that any local measures restricting ICE cooperation would have "immediate impacts to public safety," adding those impacts are often felt most acutely within immigrant communities where criminal offenders may reside.
## Houston's World Cup Countdown Starts Now
Houston's East Downtown neighborhood begins its most dramatic physical transformation in decades on May 1, when [eight blocks south of Shell Energy Stadium](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yqzAQhZ9GdGKkRRhTqLgNnW-bklmkBZQIxLCyMW-fIZM3SLfFnu_8fDz6B4YY1uk_LmTze0z9SgdHypn23uGyLSfn4BY8Y2KKwdHKBD0ouEllJNS9xxDP3hTeDsq3uiCrm6bR2rStKmbrxgGHWte-glFVw4AtaG-8M6OvsSFTBHvBlIFaa1Wpe9mo6n5vqIK2VSONrTCKfMhpL_NMmd7IYzzTi_bSpaWIds55Y1H9E9AJ6I7jKF0M7gvm9OSc1utLQHfVEtDF5DAK6C5PAZ0y1w2XLu3RS_fcZGCJcUmc5Uw7SVy9_EWxHMI0EWfpZlwnYok7yc8nZ-nxZIkHngK6Yrd-O0KMgW-NMGpaMMSfsPlvE78sfAcAAP__fOuRZA) convert into a massive FIFA Fan Festival zone ahead of the 2026 World Cup.
